mapper.select: /* TM_ECS_INTN_USR_INFO_Dao_loginIntnUsr */ SELECT A.EMPNO AS USR_ID, A.EMPNO AS USR_EMPNO, A.KORNAME AS USR_NM, 'ECS' AS SYS_DIV_CD, '' AS BIZN_DIV_CD, NVL(T.ATHR_ID, 'ECS' || 'GN01') AS ATHR_ID, A.BUSCD AS USR_DEPT_CD, A.DEPT AS USR_DEPT_NM, A.CALCD AS USR_OFCPS_CD, A.POSIT AS USR_OFCPS_NM, A.ZGRCD AS USR_JGRD_CD, A.GRADE AS USR_JGRD_NM, A.BONCD AS USR_HQ_CD, A.HEAD AS USR_HQ_NM, A.TIMCD AS USR_SECT_CD, A.SECT AS USR_SECT_NM, A.KWACD AS USR_TEAM_CD, A.TEAM AS USR_TEAM_NM, A.ZGUNC AS USR_JBGP_CD, A.BGROUP AS USR_JBGP_NM, A.ZGPCD AS USR_JBLN_CD, A.DGROUP AS USR_JBLN_NM, A.STECD AS USR_DTY_CD, A.AFFCD AS USR_DTY_NM, A.TEAM AS USR_TEAM_NM, D.KOSTL AS CSTCT_CD FROM HRM.vm_hr01601 A, ( SELECT B.usr_id, --WM_CONCAT(B.athr_id) AS athr_id LISTAGG(B.athr_id, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY B.athr_id) AS athr_id FROM tm_ecs_intn_usr_athr B, tm_ecs_intn_athr C WHERE B.athr_id = C.athr_id AND B.usr_id = #{usrId} AND C.intn_sys_div_cd = 'ECS' GROUP BY B.usr_id ) T, HRM.vm_hr01a01 D WHERE A.empno = #{usrId} AND A.empno = T.usr_id(+) AND A.buscd = D.objid AND SYSDATE BETWEEN D.strdt AND D.enddt
